title: SUNCO Backend-Review Finding (BACKEND-AUDIT.md entry)
description: Schema for a single backend-review finding emitted into .planning/domains/backend/BACKEND-AUDIT.md by the 4 backend-review surface workflows (Phase 47/M3.6). audit_version: 1 corresponds to state enum = ["open"] single-value. Phase 49/M4.2 expands this schema to audit_version: 2 with finding-lifecycle states (resolved / dismissed-with-rationale) and transition semantics — those states MUST NOT appear as active enum values at audit_version: 1. Lenient additive (additionalProperties:true) so Phase 49 + Phase 48 cross-domain extensions may add fields without a version bump for unrelated changes.

rule.description: Rule identifier. For deterministic findings, one of Phase 43 detector's 7 rule IDs (raw-sql-interpolation, missing-timeout, swallowed-catch, any-typed-body, missing-validation-public-route, non-reversible-migration, logged-secret). For heuristic / requires-human-confirmation findings, reviewer-agent-authored rule slug (e.g., 'slo-projection-drift', 'idempotency-gap').

severity.description: R6 severity vocabulary. No FAIL/WARN/PASS — those belong to gate layers, not finding labels.

kind.description: Spec §7 Phase 3.6 finding classification. deterministic = Phase 43 detector output only (workflow Step 2 sole producer). heuristic = LLM reasoning with partial static evidence. requires-human-confirmation = LLM reasoning with no static evidence, needs human verification.

file.description: Repository-relative path of the file the finding points to. Use '-' when the finding is not file-local (e.g., cross-cutting operational concern).

line.description: 1-based line number within file. Use 0 when not line-local.

match.description: Short excerpt (≤1 line) that triggered the finding. Optional for non-code-local findings.

source.description: Provenance marker: 'detector' for Phase 43 output, a Phase 42 reference filename (e.g., 'api-design.md') for heuristic findings citing a reference doc, or 'spec-projection' for findings derived from spec/contract comparison (e.g., BACKEND-CONTEXT SLO vs OPS-SPEC slo drift).

state.description: Finding lifecycle state. At audit_version: 1 (Phase 47) this enum is single-value ['open']. Phase 49/M4.2 introduces audit_version: 2 with 'resolved' and 'dismissed' states + transition semantics managed by the verify gate and proceed-gate. Emitting any value other than 'open' at audit_version: 1 is a spec violation.
